title: School of Education artists earn top honors in 2026 Arts Business Competition
summary_en: Two School of Education artists were recognized in the 2026 Arts Business Competition at UW–Madison: MFA candidate Fatemeh Fani received the first place award, and Maja Hastings, a 2025 Art Department alumna, finished second place.
title_cn: 教育学院艺术工作者在2026年艺术商业竞赛中荣获最高荣誉
summary_cn: 近期，2026年艺术商业竞赛正式完成评审工作并公布获奖结果，教育学院参赛艺术工作者在本次赛事中表现优异，荣获竞赛最高等级荣誉。

title: Three School of Education students recognized as spring 2026 ‘notable grads’
summary_en: Three School of Education students — Anna Bitonti, Molly Gerrish, and Heaven Williams — were recently recognized as spring 2026 “notable grads” by UW–Madison’s Office of Strategic Communication.
title_cn: 教育学院三名学生获评2026年春季“优秀毕业生”

title: UW–Madison study shows how school districts and universities ‘connected the dots’ to build equity-focused school leadership across 21 states
summary_en: A new study from UW–Madison education researchers Aziz Awaludin and Richard Halverson offers a detailed, data‑driven look at how school districts and universities worked together to design principal preparation programs with equity at the center.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校研究揭示21州学区与高校联动构建公平导向学校领导力的实践路径
summary_cn: 近日，美国威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校发布教育领域专项研究成果，该项研究围绕学校领导力建设主题，系统梳理了全美21个州地方学区与高等院校协同开展公平导向学校管理队伍建设的相关实践，明确了各主体协作的内在逻辑与实施路径。

title: UW–Madison faculty member appointed to Michigan Black Student Project task force
summary_en: UW–Madison’s Naomi Mae W., an assistant professor in the School of Education’s Department of Educational Policy Studies, has been appointed to a statewide task force for the Michigan Black Student Project.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校教职人员获任密歇根州黑人学生项目工作组成员
